result.model_info: ELMo - Embeddings from Language Models (Peters et al., 2018)
result.advantage_over_word2vec: 同一个词在不同语境中会有不同的向量表示

example_demonstration.sentence_1: I went to the bank to close my account before lunch.
example_demonstration.sentence_2: The children had a picnic on the river bank after the storm.
example_demonstration.embedding_similarity: 虽然都是词 'bank'，但在ELMo中会产生不同的向量，体现了不同的语义

result.impact: ELMo展示了预训练语言模型能够捕捉语义歧义和语境依赖性，这成为后续BERT等模型的基础。

user_input: Sentence 1: I went to the bank to close my account before lunch. | Sentence 2: The children had a picnic on the river bank after the storm.
